channel.title: Cariboo Signals: Deep Dives
channel.description: Long-form debate episodes on weighty topics — politics, philosophy, economics, technology. Hosted by Riley (tech optimist & empiricist) and Casey (community skeptic & systems thinker), broadcasting from the Cariboo region of BC. Each episode is built from curated sources and auto-expanded with credible coverage.
channel.itunes:author: Riley and Casey
channel.itunes:summary: Long-form debate episodes on weighty topics — politics, philosophy, economics, technology. Hosted by Riley (tech optimist & empiricist) and Casey (community skeptic & systems thinker), broadcasting from the Cariboo region of BC. Each episode is built from curated sources and auto-expanded with credible coverage.

item.title: Aging_Genx: Discussion of aging_genx
item.description:
Topic: Aging_Genx

Central question: Discussion of aging_genx

Curated sources:
I was laid off in my 60s and can't find a job after 11 months. I wish I could retire, but I can't afford it.
Many workers and bosses agree there
Whole-Person Mental Health: Care, Choice, Community, and Combatting Populism
Are you guilty of ‘job hugging?’ Career expert on another workplace trend
Are you guilty of ‘job hugging?’ Career expert on another workplace trend

Additional sources consulted:
The Sandwich Generation | Pew Research Center
A National Profile of Sandwich Generation Caregivers Providing Care to Both Older Adults and Children - PMC
Coping strategies of the sandwich generation in the care process: a qualitative study - PMC
BURNING THE CANDLE AT BOTH ENDS: SANDWICH GENERATION CAREGIVING IN THE U.S.
The Sandwich Generation: Stuck Between Aging Parents, Young Children

Generated by Claude (Anthropic) · Audio by OpenAI TTS · Sources via Brave Search · CC BY-NC 4.0
